Bulusu Research Subgroup

My group is the confluence of experimental fluid dynamics and ubiquitous computing, drawing on mechanical engineering, computational science, and the physics of living systems.

Several researchers ranging from post doctoral scientists to high school students have worked with me, filling in the knowledge gaps and moving the needle of science.

Information about current and former particpants will be updated soon..

© 2026. All rights reserved.

LICENSE | NOTICE | CHANGELOG

Kartik Bulusu

"A conviction that engineering must serve society shapes everything we do, from the laboratory and the classroom, to everything beyond."

Associate Research Professor
The George Washington University.
